description: This file defines a custom React hook called useTasks, which manages task state including CRUD operations, local storage persistence, and optional backend synchronization. It interacts with storage and API services and provides utilities for task management within a React application.

methods.name: generateId()
methods.description: Generates a unique task ID based on timestamp and randomness.

methods.name: addTask
methods.description: Creates a new task object with default and provided data, adds it to state, and attempts backend creation.

methods.name: updateTaskHandler
methods.description: Updates an existing task with specified changes and syncs with backend.

methods.name: deleteTaskHandler
methods.description: Removes a task by ID from state and deletes it in backend.

methods.name: moveTaskHandler
methods.description: Reorders a task within columns and updates its status and position in backend.

methods.name: getColumnTasks
methods.description: Filters tasks belonging to a specific column based on status.
